title: helianthemum variabile var. asperum
intro: Helianthemum variabile var. asperum, also known as rockrose, is a type of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for wound healing, reducing fever, and fighting off infections. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against cell damage. In herbal preparations, rockrose can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal problems.
